title: cyperus paniculatus
intro: Cyperus paniculatus, also known as Gota Kola or Indian Pennywort, is a perennial aquatic plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anticonvulsant properties. The health benefits of Cyperus paniculatus include improving cognitive function, reducing anxiety and stress, and acting as a natural sedative. Cyperus paniculatus is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or extract, and can also be consumed in capsule or powder form.
